title: 2025–2026 Fall Semester Midterm Exam Schedule
content:
Dear Students,

The

of the Faculty of Medicine has been announced below.

Please note that the

exams for common university courses

(such as Atatürk’s Principles and History of Reforms, Turkish Language, and Foreign Language)

will be announced separately by the Rectorate.

Courses that do not have an in-class exam will be

assessed through assignments as midterm evaluations.

Additionally, please note that the

course coded ENG 103

belongs

exclusively to the English Program of the Faculty of Medicine.

We wish all our students success in their exams.

Üsküdar University

Faculty of Medicine Dean’s Office
